name: Strawberry-Cheese Salad Robert
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine in a bowl the strawberry/banana jello and 1 cup boiling water. Stir until the jello dissolves.
2. Add sliced frozen strawberries and stir until they break apart.
3. Add 1 can crushed pineapple (well drained) and 1 mashed banana. Mix until blended.
4. Spoon half of the jello mixture into an 8-inch square pan. Chill until set.
5. Set the other half aside at room temperature.
6. Combine 1 package cream cheese, 1 cup sour cream, and 1/2 cup chopped walnuts in a bowl. Mix until well blended.
7. Spread evenly over the set jello.
8. Pour the remaining jello mixture over the cheese mixture. Chill until set.
9. Cut into squares and serve on crisp lettuce leaves.
